description: The Walfisk WF750 UrbanX is a 750W fat-tire commuter built for city streets and light trails, with a big 35Ah battery and a 28 mph Class 3 top speed.
The Walfisk ET-7 Ultra is a high-power 3000W full-suspension off-road e-bike with a 60V 45Ah battery and roughly 100 miles of range. Not street-legal as a Class e-bike; intended for off-road use.
The Walfisk WF26 pairs a reliable Bafang 750W motor with 26-inch fat tires and a 22.5Ah battery, a versatile do-it-all fat-tire e-bike.

EUNORAU URUS 2.0 – 48V 500W Bafang M600 Mid Motor Full Suspension All-Terrain eMTB The EUNORAU URUS 2.0 is a high-performance, full-suspension electric mountain bike engineered for riders who demand power and precision on technical trails. Equipped with a high-torque Bafang M600 mid-drive motor and a premium RockShox suspension system, it delivers a smooth, aggressive ride across rugged landscapes

The DUOTTS C29-K is the long-range version of the C29: a 750W 29-inch e-bike with a 20Ah battery good for roughly 90 miles per charge.
The DUOTTS C29Max adds smart torque sensing to the popular C29 platform: a 750W 29-inch commuter and light-trail e-bike with Shimano 21-speed gearing.
The DUOTTS C29 Lite is an entry-level, lightweight 250W pedal-assist commuter on 29-inch wheels.
The DUOTTS F26 Lite is a 750W full-suspension fat-tire e-bike built for off-road and trail riding on 26-inch wheels.
The DUOTTS S26 is an all-wheel-drive fat-tire e-bike with dual 750W motors (1500W combined) and a 20Ah Samsung battery, built for serious off-road traction.
